datasets.name: claims_kpis
queryLines:
WITH claims AS (
  SELECT * FROM healthcare.bronze.claims
), high_cost AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS high_cost_claims FROM healthcare.analytics.high_cost_claims_summary
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_claims,
  COUNT(DISTINCT provider_id) AS active_providers,
  ROUND(SUM(CAST(billed_amount AS DOUBLE)), 2) AS total_billed_amount,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(billed_amount AS DOUBLE)), 2) AS avg_billed_amount,
  ROUND(MAX(CAST(billed_amount AS DOUBLE)), 2) AS max_billed_amount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN procedure_code IS NULL OR TRIM(CAST(procedure_code AS STRING)) = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_procedure_claims,
  SUM(CASE WHEN billed_amount IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_billed_amount_claims,
  (SELECT high_cost_claims FROM high_cost) AS high_cost_claims,
  ROUND(100.0 * (SELECT high_cost_claims FROM high_cost) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS high_cost_claim_pct
FROM claims

datasets.name: daily_billed_trend
queryLines:
SELECT claim_date, ROUND(total_billed_amount, 2) AS total_billed_amount
FROM healthcare.analytics.claims_dashboard_summary
ORDER BY claim_date

datasets.name: daily_high_cost_trend
queryLines:
SELECT claim_date, high_cost_claim_count
FROM healthcare.analytics.claims_dashboard_summary
ORDER BY claim_date

datasets.name: quality_issues
queryLines:
WITH claims AS (
  SELECT * FROM healthcare.bronze.claims
), providers AS (
  SELECT * FROM healthcare.bronze.providers
), claim_stats AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS total_claims,
    COUNT(DISTINCT claim_id) AS distinct_claims,
    SUM(CASE WHEN procedure_code IS NULL OR TRIM(CAST(procedure_code AS STRING)) = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_procedure,
    SUM(CASE WHEN billed_amount IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_billed,
    MAX(CAST(billed_amount AS DOUBLE)) AS max_billed,
    AVG(CAST(billed_amount AS DOUBLE)) AS avg_billed
  FROM claims
), orphaned_providers AS (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.provider_id) AS orphan_provider_ids
  FROM claims c
  LEFT ANTI JOIN providers p ON c.provider_id = p.provider_id
), provider_stats AS (
  SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN location IS NULL OR TRIM(CAST(location AS STRING)) = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_location
  FROM providers
)
SELECT 'Q1 unique IDs' AS quality_check, total_claims - distinct_claims AS issue_count FROM claim_stats
UNION ALL SELECT 'Q2 missing procedure', missing_procedure FROM claim_stats
UNION ALL SELECT 'Q3 missing billed', missing_billed FROM claim_stats
UNION ALL SELECT 'Q4 orphan provider', orphan_provider_ids FROM orphaned_providers
UNION ALL SELECT 'Q5 billed outlier', CASE WHEN max_billed / NULLIF(avg_billed, 0) > 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM claim_stats
UNION ALL SELECT 'Q6 missing location', missing_location FROM provider_stats
ORDER BY quality_check

datasets.name: specialty_claims
queryLines:
SELECT specialty, claim_count
FROM healthcare.analytics.claims_by_specialty_summary
ORDER BY claim_count DESC, specialty ASC

datasets.name: specialty_cost
queryLines:
SELECT specialty, ROUND(avg_billed_amount, 2) AS avg_billed_amount
FROM healthcare.analytics.claims_by_specialty_summary
ORDER BY avg_billed_amount DESC, specialty ASC

datasets.name: region_claims
queryLines:
SELECT region, claim_count
FROM healthcare.analytics.claims_by_region_summary
ORDER BY claim_count DESC, region ASC

datasets.name: region_cost
queryLines:
SELECT region, ROUND(avg_billed_amount, 2) AS avg_billed_amount
FROM healthcare.analytics.claims_by_region_summary
ORDER BY avg_billed_amount DESC, region ASC

datasets.name: risk_tiers
queryLines:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN amount_to_benchmark_ratio >= 2.5 THEN 'Critical'
    WHEN amount_to_benchmark_ratio >= 2.0 THEN 'High'
    ELSE 'Watch'
  END AS risk_tier,
  COUNT(*) AS claim_count
FROM healthcare.analytics.high_cost_claims_summary
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY claim_count DESC

datasets.name: provider_risk_top
queryLines:
WITH high_cost AS (
  SELECT provider_id, doctor_name, COUNT(*) AS high_cost_claims
  FROM healthcare.analytics.high_cost_claims_summary
  GROUP BY provider_id, doctor_name
)
SELECT doctor_name, high_cost_claims
FROM high_cost
ORDER BY high_cost_claims DESC, doctor_name ASC
LIMIT 10

datasets.name: procedure_risk_top
queryLines:
SELECT procedure_code, COUNT(*) AS high_cost_claims
FROM healthcare.analytics.high_cost_claims_summary
GROUP BY procedure_code
ORDER BY high_cost_claims DESC, procedure_code ASC
LIMIT 10

datasets.name: diagnosis_category_mix
queryLines:
SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS claim_count
FROM healthcare.analytics.claims_diagnosis_joined
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY claim_count DESC, category ASC

datasets.name: diagnosis_severity_mix
queryLines:
SELECT severity, COUNT(*) AS claim_count
FROM healthcare.analytics.claims_diagnosis_joined
GROUP BY severity
ORDER BY claim_count DESC, severity ASC

datasets.name: diagnosis_cost_mix
queryLines:
SELECT category, ROUND(AVG(CAST(billed_amount AS DOUBLE)), 2) AS avg_billed_amount
FROM healthcare.analytics.claims_diagnosis_joined
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY avg_billed_amount DESC, category ASC

datasets.name: ops_update_summary
queryLines:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN update_state LIKE 'SETTING_UP%' THEN 'SETUP'
    WHEN update_state LIKE 'WAITING%' THEN 'WAITING'
    WHEN update_state LIKE 'Update %' THEN 'UPDATE'
    WHEN update_state LIKE 'Reported flow%' THEN 'FLOW'
    ELSE COALESCE(update_state, 'OTHER')
  END AS update_state,
  COUNT(*) AS update_count
FROM healthcare.analytics.ops_pipeline_updates
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY update_count DESC, update_state ASC

datasets.name: ops_expectation_failures
queryLines:
SELECT
  COALESCE(dataset, 'unknown') AS dataset,
  SUM(failed_records) AS failed_records
FROM healthcare.analytics.ops_expectation_metrics
GROUP BY dataset
ORDER BY failed_records DESC, dataset ASC

datasets.name: ops_failure_counts
queryLines:
SELECT COALESCE(dataset, 'unknown') AS dataset, COUNT(*) AS failure_count
FROM healthcare.analytics.ops_latest_failures
GROUP BY dataset
ORDER BY failure_count DESC, dataset ASC

datasets.name: adjudication_kpis
queryLines: SELECT *
FROM healthcare.analytics.claims_adjudication_summary

datasets.name: denial_reason_mix
queryLines:
SELECT denial_reason_code, denied_claims
FROM healthcare.analytics.claims_denial_reason_summary
WHERE denied_claims > 0
ORDER BY denied_claims DESC, denial_reason_code ASC

datasets.name: denial_reason_impact
queryLines:
SELECT denial_reason_code, ROUND(denied_billed_amount, 2) AS denied_billed_amount
FROM healthcare.analytics.claims_denial_reason_summary
WHERE denied_billed_amount > 0
ORDER BY denied_billed_amount DESC, denial_reason_code ASC

datasets.name: revenue_funnel
queryLines:
SELECT 'Billed' AS revenue_stage, total_billed_amount AS amount
FROM healthcare.analytics.claims_adjudication_summary
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Allowed' AS revenue_stage, total_allowed_amount AS amount
FROM healthcare.analytics.claims_adjudication_summary
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Paid' AS revenue_stage, total_paid_amount AS amount
FROM healthcare.analytics.claims_adjudication_summary

datasets.name: daily_adjudication_revenue_trend
queryLines:
SELECT claim_date, denied_claims, ROUND(total_paid_amount, 2) AS total_paid_amount
FROM healthcare.analytics.claims_revenue_daily_summary
ORDER BY claim_date
